monitor_the_situation.title: US Forces Attack Kabudarahang County in Central Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Kabudarahang County, Iran · 2h ago. US forces attacked Kabudarahang County in central Iran, expanding the strike campaign to a new area.
US Launches 11th Straight Night of Airstrikes on Iran Near Strait of Hormuz
— S4 · Conflict · Bushehr, Iran · 5h ago. Multiple US airstrikes targeted the city of Bushehr in southern Iran. Casualties and damage not yet confirmed.
American B-1 Bombers Head to Iran to Strike Missile Cities
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 10h ago. US B-1 bombers are en route to Iran for airstrikes on missile-related targets, the first such mission since the 40-day war.
